ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court finds that notice is appropriate. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated July 19, 2013 is admitted to probate. Britta Peterson-McCutchen is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $301,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
